Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add workflow validator and GPU smoke-test tooling

workflow_validator.py proves a workflow JSON will load before anything
touches the GPU: node classes, required inputs (ComfyUI API demands all
of them — spec defaults are UI-only), enum/model values, link types,
cycles, and .meta.json sidecar consistency. Workflows whose sidecar
declares requires_download pass with warnings instead of failing on
missing models/nodes. smoke_test_workflow.py fills PARAM_* placeholders
with cheap test values, uploads input images, queues via REST, and
polls history — proving the workflow actually runs (catches runtime
mismatches static validation cannot, e.g. cross-pack MESH objects).
tests/test_workflow_validation.py wires both into pytest: structural
checks always, live object_info check under -m integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

gate.reason: no sidecar; source files changed without a gate run

commit_message:
fix: repair workflow library drift against installed ComfyUI

Full validation found 22 of 48 workflows referencing models or node
classes not present on this install. Repairs:
- Spec drift: newly-required inputs filled from object_info defaults
  (UNETLoader.weight_dtype, ImageResize+ interpolation/method/condition,
  TransparentBGSession+ mode/use_jit, LTXAVTextEncoderLoader rewiring,
  TripoSGVAEDecoder decode params, ImageCompositeMasked x/y, etc.)
- Renamed classes rebuilt with real installed ones: TripoSR chain
  (InspyrenetRembg + TripoSRModelLoader -> TripoSRSampler -> TripoSRViewer),
  TTS-Audio-Suite (UnifiedTTSTextNode, F5TTSEngineNode, CharacterVoicesNode,
  RVCEngineNode), TripoSG input renames + local model path
- Re-points: blender_pose_to_render -> SDXL + OpenPoseXL2;
  generate_3d image stage flux -> SDXL (8GB VRAM headroom for the
  rembg+TripoSR stages)
- 15 workflows needing absent models/node-packs (Kontext, Flux2,
  Fill, LTX-2, Hunyuan3D mini/turbo/v2.5, ACE-Step, SD1.5 ControlNets,
  VideoHelperSuite/Wav2Lip/MMAudio) documented via requires_download
  blocks in their sidecars — exact files, sources, sizes
- Sidecars: missing param declarations added (face_id_portrait,
  hunyuan3d_v20_geometry_only)

Validator: 48/48 PASS. GPU smoke tests: blender_pose_to_render,
style_transfer_weighted, generate_3d, image_to_3d, image_to_3d_triposg
all produce artifacts. Details in fix_plan.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: remove stray session-state files from workflows/mcp

.claude/ and .omc/ state directories were accidentally created inside
workflows/mcp by an agent session and swept into the previous commit.
Untrack and ignore them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: revive dead workflow test suites; migrate direct pipeline to SDXL

Three test fixtures pointed WorkflowManager at packages/mcp-server/
workflows — a directory that has never existed in the monorepo layout —
so 22 tests had been failing since the initial monorepo commit. They
now resolve the repo-root workflows/mcp (COMFY_MCP_WORKFLOW_DIR
overrides, matching server behavior).

The Blender addon direct pipeline defaulted to v1-5-pruned-emaonly.ckpt,
which is not installed on this machine; DEFAULT_CHECKPOINT is now
sd_xl_base_1.0.safetensors and live/expectation tests updated to match
(download-deferred workflows keep their documented SD1.5 stack and are
exempted). conftest image fixtures now produce real PIL-decodable PNGs —
the old header-only fakes crashed ComfyUI LoadImage in live runs.

Full suite: 460 passed, 0 failed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

gate.reason: no sidecar; source files changed without a gate run

commit_message:
feat: add workflow-architect agent; fix comfyui-mcp console entry point

workflow-architect creates NEW parametric workflows end-to-end from the
live install (introspect object_info -> draft -> validate -> GPU smoke
test -> parameterize -> sidecar) — complementing workflow-engineer,
which maintains existing ones. Registered in the CLAUDE.md agent table.

server.py: the comfyui-mcp console script declared server:main but no
main() existed, so the command crashed on launch; the run logic now
lives in main(). The stdio path also printed its banner to stdout,
which corrupts the MCP JSON-RPC stream — moved to stderr.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
